critic.diagnosis: Same dual-panel chart structure with matching data points and trends. Key differences: legend in generated image is positioned at bottom-left and overlaps the x-axis label 'Epoch', whereas reference has legend at top-left cleanly separated. Generated uses different marker styles (plus signs, x marks visible in legend) and thinner lines. Data labels in left panel overlap more in generated version. Overall layout and values match but legend placement and marker rendering differ noticeably.
